reviews.review_description: This was an totally tubular fan game! City was really cool (even though I couldn't buy anything lol), and I like what you did with the player model. Forest was also very cool and I like how everything had a "mini" aspect. I as well liked what you did with the holes in Canyons (no diddy). And I think by far Caves was my favorite map. If this game got more people, and maybe a tag mode, this would be an awesome fang game!
WTH IS THIIIS! Couldn’t buy anything, player models were booty, THE MAPS LOOKED LIKE DOG!
